hotel.name: Beacon Hotel Onomichi
hotel.place: Beacon Hotel Onomichi, Onomichi, Hiroshima, Japan

days.note: Arrival from Hiroshima — overnight countryside stop

activities.name: Shinkansen: Hiroshima → Mihara + Transfer to Onomichi
activities.notes: Shinkansen Hiroshima → Mihara (~25 min), then JR Sanyo Line Mihara → Onomichi (~15 min). Or direct JR Sanyo Line from Hiroshima (~1.5h, no transfer but slower).

activities.name: Check in & drop bags
activities.notes: Beacon Hotel is right at Onomichi Station. Drop bags, grab a map at the station.

activities.name: 🍴 Onomichi Ramen
activities.notes: Onomichi is famous for its local ramen — soy sauce-based with pork back fat floating on top. Try shops along the Hondori Shopping Arcade near the station.

activities.name: Cat Alley (Neko no Hosomichi)
activities.notes: Narrow stone-paved lane with 108 hand-painted lucky stone cats, real cats lounging around, quirky art galleries and cafés. Stroke a stone cat's head 3 times for good luck.
activities.place: Neko no Hosomichi, Onomichi, Hiroshima, Japan

activities.name: Senkoji Temple & Observatory
activities.notes: Walk up from Cat Alley (15 min) or take the ropeway (¥500 one-way). Panoramic views of Onomichi, the Seto Inland Sea, and surrounding islands from the observation deck. Senkoji Temple dates to 806 AD.

activities.name: Temple Walk (partial)
activities.notes: Walk downhill from Senkoji through the hillside lanes connecting ancient temples. The full route is 2.5km / 25 temples — do as much as you like. Highlights: Tenneiji (3-tier pagoda with sea backdrop), Jodoji (oldest temple). Winding alleys through residential areas with daily life scenes.
activities.place: Onomichi Temple Walk, Onomichi, Hiroshima, Japan

activities.name: Onomichi Waterfront & Hondori Arcade
activities.notes: Stroll the waterfront with views of Mukaishima Island across the narrow channel. Browse the retro Hondori Shopping Arcade — old-school covered shopping street.

activities.name: 🍴 Dinner — Onomichi Yokocho or Waterfront Izakaya
activities.notes: Try local seafood — Onomichi is a port town. Onomichi Yokocho is a fun izakaya alley. Fresh sashimi, grilled fish, local sake.

days.note: Morning in Onomichi → Travel to Tokyo

activities.name: Morning waterfront coffee
activities.notes: POUR Specialty Coffee opens at 7 AM — grab a coffee by the waterside. Or try the hotel breakfast at Beacon.

activities.name: Train: Onomichi → Tokyo
activities.notes: JR Onomichi → Mihara (~15 min) → Shinkansen Mihara → Tokyo (~3.5h). Arrive Tokyo early afternoon.
